task: Take the green object and put it on the lower right part of the table
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A stainless steel pot sits on a wooden table. A purple sponge is to the right of the pot, and a red-handled tool is to the left. The pot is metallic and cylindrical with a handle. The task is to move the green object (not visible in the image, but assumed to be in the scene) to the lower right part of the table. STRATEGY - First, locate and grasp the green object, then transport it to the lower right area. Failure modes include mislocating the object or dropping it during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the green object (if visible) or assume its location. Step 2: Grasp the object securely. Step 3: Transport it to the lower right. Step 4: Place it there.

Goal: on(green_object, lower_right_table); stable(green_object)
Scene: green_object, stainless_steel_pot, purple_sponge, red_handled_tool, table
Step 1: reach(green_object)
  affordance_region: the body of the green object (assumed to be on the table)
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_object, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_object) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_object)
  affordance_region: the body of the green object
  contact: holding(green_object) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_object)
Step 3: transport(green_object -> lower_right_table)
  affordance_region: an empty area in the lower right part of the table
  spatial: above(green_object, lower_right_table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_object)
  done_when: above(green_object, lower_right_table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(green_object -> lower_right_table)
  affordance_region: an empty area in the lower right part of the table
  contact: surface_contact(green_object, lower_right_table) [completion]; released(green_object) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_object) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(green_object, lower_right_table) AND released(green_object)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the green object (assumed to be on the table)
the body of the green object
an empty area in the lower right part of the table
an empty area in the lower right part of the table
